diagnostics.canonicalMessage: Required accepted upstream evidence is missing or non-passing.
diagnostics.suggestedAction: Restore passing accepted P2 and source-family packaging evidence before mapping.

diagnostics.canonicalMessage: Accepted upstream evidence or catalog bytes do not match their bound hashes.
diagnostics.suggestedAction: Restore the accepted upstream artifact closure or review the upstream change separately.

diagnostics.canonicalMessage: Layout mapping bytes do not match the immutable layout-package fixture.
diagnostics.suggestedAction: Restore the checked mapping descriptor or review a new layout-package trust anchor.

diagnostics.canonicalMessage: Physical source bytes do not match the accepted packaged-candidate counterpart.
diagnostics.suggestedAction: Restore the checked physical source byte or review the authority change outside this layout-only proof.

diagnostics.canonicalMessage: Layout mapping does not cover the complete fixed logical source ABI.
diagnostics.suggestedAction: Map every required logical entry exactly once.

diagnostics.canonicalMessage: Multiple physical source rows select the same logical target.
Physical source path is hidden, traversal-bearing, symlinked, or not a regular file.
diagnostics.suggestedAction: Use a normalized visible POSIX path to an independent regular file.

diagnostics.canonicalMessage: Physical source entry has a hardlink alias.
diagnostics.suggestedAction: Replace hardlinked inputs with independent regular files.

diagnostics.canonicalMessage: Logical source path is outside the exact fixed source-conformance ABI.
diagnostics.suggestedAction: Select only manifest.json and the ordered SC_SOURCE_FILES closure.

diagnostics.canonicalMessage: Physical source tree contains a regular file absent from the mapping descriptor.
diagnostics.suggestedAction: Remove the extra file or review a replacement fixed mapping separately.

diagnostics.canonicalMessage: Staged logical source bytes differ from their verified physical input.
diagnostics.suggestedAction: Stage raw source bytes without parsing, normalization, or rewriting.

diagnostics.canonicalMessage: Layout mapping requests a parser, merge, selector, transform, or other content-aware behavior.
diagnostics.suggestedAction: Keep the descriptor path-only and copy raw bytes.

diagnostics.canonicalMessage: Mapped source content changes the canonical declared-source reference namespace.
Checked source-conformance compiler or runtime bytes do not match the accepted closure.
diagnostics.suggestedAction: Restore the accepted compiler and runtime closure before running the layout proof.

diagnostics.canonicalMessage: The unchanged source-conformance compiler did not produce the expected mapped-bundle result.
diagnostics.suggestedAction: Inspect the isolated compiler result without adding layout-specific compiler logic.

diagnostics.canonicalMessage: Layout descriptor requests new component, fact, policy, review, or namespace authority.
diagnostics.suggestedAction: Remove authority-bearing descriptor fields and preserve the accepted bundle unchanged.

diagnostics.canonicalMessage: Mapped bundle preserves the accepted non-executable owner review requirement.
diagnostics.suggestedAction: Keep the exception non-executable until its declared owner completes review.

diagnostics.canonicalMessage: Persisted mapped compiler artifacts fail integrity after temporary workspace removal.
diagnostics.suggestedAction: Regenerate and re-verify the complete eight-artifact inner closure.

diagnostics.canonicalMessage: Source-family layout mapping evidence hash does not match its checked closure.
diagnostics.suggestedAction: Regenerate final evidence from the checked immutable and generated closure.
